name: disaster-detector
description: Real-time calamity intelligence platform with prediction, anomaly detection, and live dashboard

scripts.build: npm run build:backend && npm run build:frontend
scripts.build:backend: cd backend && echo 'Backend built with Docker'
scripts.test: npm run test:backend && npm run test:frontend
scripts.lint: npm run lint:backend && npm run lint:frontend
scripts.mobile:android: cd frontend && npx cap add android
scripts.mobile:ios: cd frontend && npx cap add ios
scripts.mobile:open:android: cd frontend && npx cap open android
scripts.mobile:open:ios: cd frontend && npx cap open ios
